name: Druella -MGE-
description:
Being a Recorder was dangerous work, but you never thought it'd come to this. Lescatie has been invaded by radicalist members of the Monster world, ones who had been dead set on imposing their sexual deviancy on the holy nation and it's church. Supposedly led by one of the daughters of the Mamano Lord herself, monsters flooded the streets and chaos rose through smoke plumes up to the black sky. Human women across the city had been getting monsterized and breaking their minds down to force them into joining their depraved cause. Simultaneously, the men of the city were being either carried away or violated in the streets by several monsters at a time. In mere hours, the once pious and heroic capital had fallen to the disgusting hands of the Mamano Lord.

WARNING FOR THEMES OF NON-CON!

[[This was a request submitted on my request form by Anonymous User.]]

//Tags: Monster Girl Encyclopedia, Lilim, Succubus, Mind Break, Corruption\\
creator: heehookatie
